commands.review_summary:
The PR expands the Control UI `extractThinking()` text-block fallback regex to recognize MiniMax and related reasoning tags and adds focused unit tests for those cases.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +29. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current `extractThinking()` only matches bare `<think>`/`<thinking>` fallback tags, while visible assistant text is already sanitized by the broader reasoning-tag helper. That leaves namespaced inline reasoning stripped from the body but unavailable to the reasoning panel.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Do not queue automated repair; the code review found no concrete patch defect, and the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus normal maintainer review.

target.title: fix(control-ui): recognize namespaced reasoning tags in thinking extraction
target.body:
## Problem
The Control UI reasoning panel calls `extractThinking()`, whose back-compat path (for older logs that inline reasoning inside text blocks) matched only `<think>` / `<thinking>`:

```
/<\s*think(?:ing)?\s*>([\s\S]*?)<\s*\/\s*think(?:ing)?\s*>/gi
```

MiniMax models emit namespaced `<mm:think>…</mm:think>` (and `<thought>` / `<antthinking>` exist too), which were not recognized here. Meanwhile the *visible* message text is already cleaned by the mm-aware reasoning-tag handling (whose tag set includes the `(?:antml:|mm:)?` prefix), so for such logs the reasoning was stripped from the body **and** invisible to the panel — the user saw it nowhere.

This is the UI-side sibling of the recent `mm:` reasoning-tag fixes (#93767 core helper, #93806, #93874 slack, #93926 matrix, #93820 imessage); this extraction path was missed.

## Fix
Recognize the same tag set already used in `src/auto-reply/tokens.ts`:

```
/<\s*(?:(?:antml:|mm:)?(?:think(?:ing)?|thought)|antthinking)\s*>([\s\S]*?)<\s*\/\s*(?:(?:antml:|mm:)?(?:think(?:ing)?|thought)|antthinking)\s*>/gi
```

## Test
Added back-compat cases in `message-extract.test.ts`: asserts `<mm:think>`, `<thought>`, and `<antthinking>` are extracted, plus regression cases that plain `<think>`/`<thinking>` still work.

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/message-extract.test.ts  →  11 passed
oxlint clean
```

Note: `message-extract.ts` is also touched by #94085 / #93841, but in different functions (`extractText`/`extractRawText`) — no overlap with this back-compat regex.
